Next steps:
  1) Add coverage data:
     terrain analyze --root . --coverage path/to/lcov.info
  2) Add runtime data:
     terrain analyze --root . --runtime path/to/test-results.xml
  3) Show full findings:
     terrain analyze --root . --verbose
  4) Save trend baseline:
     terrain analyze --write-snapshot
